name: watchlink
description: WatchLink — synchronized watch-together platform with chat, reactions and WebRTC push-to-talk.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n db,server,web -c magenta,green,cyan "npm run dev:db --workspace @watchlink/server" "npm run dev --workspace @watchlink/server" "npm run dev --workspace @watchlink/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @watchlink/server && npm run build --workspace @watchlink/web
